Notes: Initial pseudostate explicitly enters TransportationMode.
TransportationMode state is explicitly modeled.
selectorPressed leaves TransportationMode and shows HomeScreen which represents being on.
ShuttingDown and ShutdownReady together represent the shutdown preparation behavior.
Releasing during ShuttingDown before the five second threshold returns to HomeScreen.
The five second threshold is modeled but it goes to ShutdownReady and requires selectorReleased before Off.
Off state is explicitly modeled.
selectorPressed from Off returns to HomeScreen.
Operational on behavior is represented but there is no enclosing On composite state.
No history pseudostate for returning to the previous on substate is modeled.
selectorHeld starts shutdown only from HomeScreen rather than from all on states.
bowlRemoved is handled in recipe execution and shutdown warning but not as a general on self transition.
Entering the powered on behavior leads to HomeScreen.
HomeScreen clearly represents the home state.
HomeScreen transitions to AutoShutdownWarning after 14min30sec.
Recipe selection followed by start reaches AddingIngredients for the first recipe step.
The start transition requires bowlPlaced which is equivalent to the bowl not being removed.
AddingIngredients is entered but no explicit action sets or prompts the ingredients.
AutoShutdownWarning represents the automatic shutdown warning period.
AutoShutdownWarning goes to Off after 30 seconds.
cancel from AutoShutdownWarning returns to HomeScreen.
AddingIngredients represents the prompt to add and weigh ingredients.
No self transition for additional ingredients within the adding step is modeled.
The model has no guard combining correct weight with more ingredients required for a self loop.
No setIngredients action is shown for a repeated ingredient prompt.
next from AddingIngredients reaches Chopping.
The transition checks correctAmount but does not check that no more ingredients are required.
Chopping has an entry note to startChopping but speed and time are not explicitly set.
Chopping state is explicitly modeled.
There is no transition from Chopping back to AddingIngredients.
No corresponding guard exists on a Chop to ingredient prompt transition.
No setIngredients action is shown after a chopping step.
next from Chopping to Cooking is modeled.
The Chopping to Cooking transition has no guard for chopping completion or ingredient need.
Cooking has an entry note to startCooking but temperature and time are not explicitly set.
Cooking state is explicitly modeled.
Cooking transitions to AddingIngredients when done and more steps remain.
The done event with moreSteps guard captures completion with further ingredients needed.
Entering AddingIngredients implies prompting again but no explicit setIngredients action is shown.
Cooking transitions to MealReady when done and no more steps remain.
The !moreSteps guard captures no further ingredients or recipe steps needed.
MealReady represents the ready to serve state.
No automatic shutdown warning transition is modeled from MealReady.
No fundamentally incorrect extra states are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra transitions are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra guards are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra actions are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra composite states are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra regions are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra history states are present.
